programmes.show_description: When respected Dr. Tom Fairchild, is arrested for murder, all prying eyes turn to his wife, Beth who is determined to protect her family and their reputation above everything.
Judge Rinder rules the courtroom, but now the respected barrister with a background in criminal defence is stepping out from behind the bench to take on real-life cases.

Peggy's car is stolen - with Deefer in the boot! Rosie has an unwelcome admirer who will not take no for an answer. Gina persuades Phil to share his feelings.
